creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
None of FreeBSDs nor DragonFly's package builders are complaining of an error like this.  It seems to be an issue local to your machine.

I suggest either using a pre-built binary or if you need to change the options, use poudriere to build GPS. Something from your environment (perhaps x11 itself) is interfering with the build.

Alternatively -- try to build it from console with desktop turned off.


To iterate:
recommendation 1) use pre-built binary
recommendation 2) build it in poudriere

Anything else, you're basically on the "use at your own risk" zone because you're not going with the recommended approach.
